---
title: "Research"
pagetitle: "Research — Fabio I. Martinenghi"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Published & Accepted

::: {.paper}
[Accepted]{.badge-accepted}

[Does refusing legal aid cause harm? A design-based double-machine-learning approach]{.paper-title}

[*Journal of Law & Economics* (forthcoming).]{.paper-meta}

[*Keywords:* indigent defense, crime, criminal justice. *JEL:* I30, K14, H44.]{.paper-keywords}

::: {.paper-links}
[[PDF](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Bi0BNi1KFUdW3smPJKYPsLcuaqXagt-B/view?usp=sharing)]{}
:::
:::

::: {.paper}
[Accepted]{.badge-accepted}

[An open repository of COVID-19 vaccine mandate studies with a worked scoping review of quasi-experimental evidence]{.paper-title}

[With C. Blyth and the MandEval team. *npj Vaccines* (forthcoming).]{.paper-meta}

[*Keywords:* immunisation, pandemics, policy, impact, best practice.]{.paper-keywords}

::: {.paper-links}
[[Journal](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41541-026-01454-4)]{}
:::
:::

## Submitted

::: {.paper}
[Submitted]{.badge-submitted}

[Pull-Forward and Induced Vaccination Under Time-Limited Mandates: Evidence from a Low-Coercion Mandate]{.paper-title}

[Lead author, with M. Genie, K. Attwell, and the MandEval team.]{.paper-meta}

[*Keywords:* mandate, vaccination, incentives, uptake, adolescents. *JEL:* I12, I18.]{.paper-keywords}

::: {.paper-links}
[[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.22714)]{}
:::
:::

::: {.paper}
[Submitted]{.badge-submitted}

[Getting Explicit Instruction Right]{.paper-title}

[With Richard Holden (UNSW).]{.paper-meta}

[*Keywords:* education, explicit instruction, pedagogy. *JEL:* I20, I21.]{.paper-keywords}

::: {.paper-links}
[[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.10480)]{}
:::
:::

## Working Papers

::: {.paper}
[Working paper]{.badge-wp}

[Career, Family, and IVF: The Impact of Involuntary Childlessness and Fertility Treatment]{.paper-title}

[With Maryam Naghsh Nejad. **Best Paper Award**, 15th Australasian Workshop on Econometrics and Health Economics. Featured on the Grattan Institute's Wonk List (2025).]{.paper-meta}

[*Keywords:* involuntary childlessness, IVF, mental health, labour market outcomes, fertility and career trade-offs. *JEL:* J13, J22, I14, I31, J16.]{.paper-keywords}

::: {.paper-links}
[[IZA WP](https://www.iza.org/publications/dp/17965/career-family-and-ivf-the-impact-of-involuntary-childlessness-and-fertility-treatment)]{}
:::
:::

::: {.paper}
[Working paper]{.badge-wp}

[Conceiving Naturally After IVF: the effect of an IVF conception on mode and timing of birth]{.paper-title}

[With X. Zhang, L. Rombauts, and G. Chambers.]{.paper-meta}

[*Keywords:* fertility, assisted reproduction, IVF, obstetric outcomes, infertility. *JEL:* I10, I12, I19.]{.paper-keywords}

::: {.paper-links}
[[arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.00234)]{}
:::
:::
